svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="a02-seed-data-flow" name="seed-data-flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-569" dy="-207" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="#fbfaf7" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="none"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="repo" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=6;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#d9ded5;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=4;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;" value="repository — the project pgmi deploys" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="290" width="250" x="30" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf1e7;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="seeds/roles.json
the catalog as data — natural keys, no order" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="210" x="50" y="126" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="migrations/001_catalog.sql" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="210" x="50" y="192" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="__test__/test_catalog_invariants.sql" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="210" x="50" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf1e7;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="deploy.sql
your orchestration, in SQL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="210" x="50" y="308" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="params" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#5d665d;dashed=1;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;" value="params file — CI-generated, layered per environment (--params-file)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="250" x="30" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="txn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=4;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#d9ded5;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=4;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;" value="inside PostgreSQL — one session · one transaction" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="620" width="700" x="360" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="views" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9f4e8;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="session views

every repo file — SQL or not — as a row" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="190" x="390" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="steps" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=8;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf1e7;strokeColor=#143d2b;verticalAlign=top;align=right;spacingRight=10;spacingTop=6;fontColor=#143d2b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="deploy.sql — every step is a query " vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="490" width="290" x="630" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="1 · validate the seed file
undeclared grants · duplicate keys → RAISE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="250" x="650" y="104" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="2 · apply migrations" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="250" x="650" y="162" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f3f7f0;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="3 · pre-apply diff
